news.headline: WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) reports Q4 and full year 2024 results, focusing on product innovation and sales growth to drive long-term success.
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, WEX, a global commerce platform listed on NYSE as WEX, has shared its financial performance for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2024. Melissa Smith, Chair, CEO, and President of WEX, expressed optimism for the future, stating that their focus on product innovation and sales expansion is expected to pave the way for long-term success in 2025. The company's strategic investments aim to boost performance and drive growth in the coming period.

news.headline: New study in NEJM evaluates Zenocutuzumab-zbco for NRG1+ cancer patients, first FDA-approved therapy for pancreatic adenocarcinoma & NSCLC.
news.summary: BIZENGRI® is the initial FDA-sanctioned treatment designated for individuals with advanced unresectable or metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma or non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with NRG1 gene fusions. The detection of NRG1 gene fusions, which is most accurate through tissue-based RNA next-generation sequencing, is crucial for this therapy.

news.headline: Great-West Lifeco had record Q4 2024 base earnings of $1.1 billion, $1.20 per share, up 15% YoY. Net earnings from continuing operations were $1.1 billion, up 50% from Q4 2023. They announced a dividend increase of 10% and plans for $500 million in share purchases under NCIB. ROE was 17.5% with a LICAT ratio of 130%. Book value per share was $27.17. Quarterly dividend increased to $0.61 per common share. CEO reflected on strong momentum, record results, and future growth prospects. Total Lifeco assets under administration exceeded $3.2 trillion, with ambitious plans for continued growth in wealth and retirement areas. Operating results varied across segments, with a positive outlook for future growth. Conference call scheduled for Feb 6. Disclaimer regarding Forward-Looking Information, Non-GAAP Financial Measures, and Ratios provided.
news.summary: Great-West Lifeco Inc. reported its Quarterly Report for the fourth quarter of 2024 with key financial highlights:- Base earnings of $1.1 billion (up 15% from Q4 2023) for the quarter and $4.2 billion for the full year (up 14% from 2023).- Net earnings from continuing operations of $1.1 billion for the quarter (up 50% from Q4 2023) and $4.0 billion for the full year (up 40% from 2023).- Base ROE of 17.5% and ROE from continuing operations of 16.7%.- LICAT ratio increased by two points in 2024 to 130%.- Book value per share was $27.17, up 12% year over year.- Quarterly dividend increased by 10% to $0.61 per common share.- Intention to purchase an additional $500 million of common shares under an existing bid.The Company's President and CEO highlighted strong financial performance, strategic focus, and diversified business operations across segments for future growth. Great-West Lifeco operates in Canada, the US, and Europe and serves over 40 million customer relationships with assets under administration exceeding $3.2 trillion as of December 31, 2024. The company also provided cautionary notes on forward-looking information and non-GAAP financial measures. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UL Solutions partners with South Korea's MSS to assist startups in navigating US product testing, advancing innovation.
news.summary: UL Solutions and South Korea’s Ministry of Small and Medium-Sized Enterprises and Startups have joined forces to aid industries and drive innovation. The partnership, stemming from an MoU penned in April 2023, focuses on assisting South Korean startups in obtaining product testing for the US market. This collaboration marks the ongoing efforts of UL Solutions, a leading company in safety science, to support global businesses.

news.headline: Berachain introducing 'Proof-of-Liquidity' blockchain soon. Get ready for BERA token airdrop.
news.summary: Berachain is on the verge of launching its new proof-of-liquidity blockchain. The network is set to go live soon, offering users a unique opportunity. A key aspect of the network is the BERA token, which will be distributed through an airdrop. This will enable token holders to participate in the ecosystem and benefit from the perks of the network. news.headline: Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee shifts from dove to hawk, highlights impact of tariffs on inflation. Warns of possible supply chain disruptions. Possibility of Fed rate cut by June.
news.summary: Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee has warned of potential disruptions to the economy, such as new trade tariffs and supply chain issues, which could force the Federal Reserve to reconsider planned rate cuts. Goolsbee's comments, made at the Automotive Insights Symposium in Detroit, emphasized the risks posed by various factors including natural disasters, strikes, and higher tariffs. With inflation still above the Fed's 2% target, investors expect rate cuts; however, Goolsbee's concerns could complicate the decision-making process. Currently, there is a 66% probability of a Fed rate cut by June according to CME Group's FedWatch Tool.

The report revealed that the company recorded third-quarter revenue of $983 million, surpassing analyst projections of $946.73 million. Additionally, they disclosed adjusted earnings of 39 cents per share, exceeding analyst forecasts of 34 cents per share. Total revenue experienced a significant 19% increase year-over-year, fueled by robust royalty revenue levels and sustained strength in license revenue. Royalty revenue specifically grew by 23% year-over-year, primarily due to the ongoing adoption of Armv9 technology.

news.headline: FitLife Brands is undergoing a 2-for-1 stock split, starting trading on Feb 7, 2025. CUSIP number changing to 33817P405.
news.summary: Omaha, Nebraska, on Feb. 5, 2025 - FitLife Brands, Inc. ("FitLife" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: FTLF) disclosed plans for a 2-for-1 forward stock split, as a provider of innovative nutritional supplements and wellness products. The split-adjusted trading of the Company’s common stock is set to commence on Friday, February 7, 2025. Additionally, in connection with the stock split, the CUSIP number for the Company’s common stock will transition to 33817P405.

The loans in question are essential as they pertain to Groupe Sélection's restructuring process. The specifics of the loans, including amounts and terms, were not disclosed in the update. This update signifies Timbercreek Financial's active involvement and monitoring of the situation as it progresses.

news.headline: New England Journal of Medicine reports on Zenocutuzumab's efficacy in NRG1 Fusion-Positive Cancer by Merus N.V. (Nasdaq: MRUS), for pancreatic adenocarcinoma and NSCLC.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Merus N.V. revealed that the New England Journal of Medicine has published the outcomes of the phase 2 eNRGy trial for Bizengri® (zenocutuzumab), a ground-breaking treatment for adults with pancreatic adenocarcinoma or non–small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) that are advanced unresectable or metastatic and have a neuregulin 1 (NRG1) gene fusion. This marks a significant milestone as Bizengri® is the first and only therapy designed for this specific patient population who have experienced disease progression following previous systemic therapy. Merus, a leading oncology company, specializes in developing full-length multispecific antibodies known as Biclonics® and Triclonics®. The company's stock is listed as Nasdaq: MRUS. This news showcases a major advancement in the field of oncology, offering hope to patients facing these challenging cancer types. The eNRGy trial results outlined in the NEJM provide valuable insights into the efficacy and potential of Bizengri® in treating these advanced forms of cancer. As of now, this development has the potential to transform treatment protocols for individuals with pancreatic adenocarcinoma and NSCLC harboring NRG1 gene fusion, with the therapy showing promise in cases where other systemic treatments have not yielded the desired outcomes.

news.headline: Viracta Therapeutics (Nasdaq: VIRX) closes, terminates employees, explores strategic options.
news.summary: In San Diego on February 5, 2025, Viracta Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: VIRX), a clinical-stage precision oncology company targeting virus-associated cancers globally, revealed it has let go of its employees and will be ceasing operations. As part of this decision, the company is considering different options for its development initiatives.

news.headline: Melbourne to host first-ever NFL regular season game in Australia, solidifying its status as sporting and cultural hub.
news.summary: On February 5th, 2025, in New Orleans, it was announced that Melbourne, Australia has reaffirmed its position as the country's hub for sports, culture, and events by successfully landing the inaugural National Football League (NFL) Regular Season game to be hosted in Australia. This historic occasion marks a significant milestone for Melbourne and underscores its growing prominence on the international stage. The game is scheduled to take place in the city, showcasing its ability to attract high-profile sporting events.
